commands.review_summary:
The PR adds internal tolerant dispatcher failed-count reads, applies them in auto-reply/ACP and Feishu fallback paths, and adds focused final-outcome regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +24, Tests +35. Total +59 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main has a direct `dispatcher.getFailedCounts().final` call, so a dispatcher object without that method will throw; I did not execute the repro locally because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair lane is needed; the prior SDK-compatibility blocker is addressed and the remaining action is normal maintainer landing.
